title: hieracium subelongatum subsp. alfenzinum
intro: Hieracium subelongatum subsp. alfenzinum is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as hawkweed, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Hieracium subelongatum subsp. alfenzinum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is sometimes used in combination with other herbs for enhanced medicinal effects.
